title: Fix site blinking/flashing issue

requirements.text: Remove or disable CSS animations and transitions that cause visible blinking or flashing effects throughout the application. Identify and eliminate fade-in animations, loading state transitions, or any other animated effects that create a flickering appearance.

quotes: ok stop the blinking of the site

acceptanceCriteria: All visible blinking, flashing, or flickering effects are eliminated
Page loads and transitions appear smooth without rapid visual changes
Loading states and UI updates occur without creating a strobing effect
The site maintains visual stability during user interactions and data fetching

constraints: Do not remove essential loading states or user feedback mechanisms
Preserve the overall visual design and layout structure
nonGoals: Redesigning the UI theme or color scheme
Changing backend logic or data handling
